description: Known historical fingerprint collisions. CI fails only for collisions not listed here.

P75.31: HOBEIAN TS0001 - shared by soil sensor and water leak sensor (both TS0001 hardware variant)

P75.31: HOBEIAN TS0001 (uppercase) - canonical manufacturer name, used by most HOBEIAN devices

P75.31: HOBEIAN TS0601 (case variant)
